Vulnerability: No MFA on EHR access single factor authentication only
Control_Gap: No MFA no PAM no zero-trust
Recommended_Control: Implement MFA and zero-trust network access for all EHR connections

Vulnerability: No immutable backups no tested recovery plan
Control_Gap: No immutable backups EHR offline 4 months
Recommended_Control: Implement 3-2-1-1 backup strategy with immutable offline copies tested monthly

Vulnerability: No DLP controls on PHI egress
Control_Gap: No DLP 791784 records exfiltrated and sold
Recommended_Control: Deploy DLP with PHI pattern detection and egress monitoring

Vulnerability: No advanced email threat protection inadequate security training
Control_Gap: No sandboxing no phishing simulation training
Recommended_Control: Deploy advanced email threat protection and mandatory phishing simulation training quarterly

Vulnerability: No 24/7 SOC monitoring 5-day attacker dwell time
Control_Gap: 5-day undetected dwell time Jan 26-31 2024
Recommended_Control: Establish 24/7 SOC with SIEM EDR and anomaly detection

Vulnerability: Medical devices on flat network no segmentation
Control_Gap: 500+ medical devices co-mingled with clinical IT
Recommended_Control: Implement Purdue Model network segmentation for all medical devices

Vulnerability: No formal vendor security assessment program
Control_Gap: No TPRM program BAAs not regularly reviewed
Recommended_Control: Implement formal TPRM with annual vendor security assessments

Vulnerability: No PAM solution overprivileged accounts
Control_Gap: No PAM overprivileged accounts enabled lateral movement
Recommended_Control: Deploy PAM with just-in-time privileged access and session recording

Vulnerability: No automated PHI discovery or classification
Control_Gap: No automated PHI discovery or classification
Recommended_Control: Implement automated data discovery and classification tool

Vulnerability: No tested downtime procedures for clinical staff
Control_Gap: Staff unprepared 4-month EHR outage caused patient safety risks
Recommended_Control: Develop and annually test comprehensive clinical downtime procedures

Vulnerability: Flat network architecture no micro-segmentation
Control_Gap: Single flat network entire hospital on same VLAN
Recommended_Control: Implement micro-segmentation and zero-trust network architecture

Vulnerability: Insufficient audit logging on PHI systems
Control_Gap: No centralized SIEM no audit log correlation
Recommended_Control: Deploy centralized SIEM with real-time PHI access alerting

Vulnerability: PHI not encrypted at field level in databases
Control_Gap: No field-level encryption on PHI databases
Recommended_Control: Implement field-level encryption on all PHI databases

Vulnerability: Partial TLS implementation on internal systems
Control_Gap: No TLS on internal clinical communications
Recommended_Control: Enforce TLS 1.3 on all internal and external PHI transmissions

Vulnerability: No formal patch management program
Control_Gap: No formal patch management 30+ day patch cycles
Recommended_Control: Implement automated patch management with 14-day critical patch SLA

Vulnerability: Inadequate security awareness training program
Control_Gap: Annual checkbox training no phishing simulations
Recommended_Control: Monthly phishing simulations quarterly security awareness training

Vulnerability: 6-month delay in notifying 791784 individuals
Control_Gap: Notification took 6 months vs 60-day HIPAA requirement
Recommended_Control: Implement automated breach notification workflow with legal review

Vulnerability: Legacy OS on imaging systems no patching program
Control_Gap: Legacy Windows on imaging systems unpatched
Recommended_Control: Implement medical device patching program with vendor coordination

Vulnerability: Pyxis systems on flat network accessible during breach
Control_Gap: No network isolation of medication dispensing systems
Recommended_Control: Isolate Pyxis systems on dedicated VLAN with strict access controls

Vulnerability: No integrity monitoring on patient monitor data feeds
Control_Gap: No automated integrity monitoring on clinical data feeds
Recommended_Control: Implement medical device security platform with anomaly detection

Vulnerability: No CASB solution no cloud access monitoring
Control_Gap: No CASB no shadow IT controls
Recommended_Control: Deploy CASB solution with DLP integration for cloud services

Vulnerability: Server room access logs not regularly reviewed
Control_Gap: Access logs not reviewed quarterly
Recommended_Control: Implement automated access log review and anomaly alerting

Vulnerability: No UEBA solution no insider threat program
Control_Gap: No behavioral analytics no insider threat detection
Recommended_Control: Deploy UEBA solution with baseline behavioral profiling

Vulnerability: Backup systems on same network as production
Control_Gap: Backups accessible from compromised network
Recommended_Control: Isolate backup systems on air-gapped network with immutable storage

Vulnerability: No documented ransomware-specific IR playbook
Control_Gap: No ransomware playbook no tabletop exercises conducted
Recommended_Control: Develop ransomware IR playbook and conduct quarterly tabletop exercises

Vulnerability: No board-level cybersecurity oversight committee
Control_Gap: No dedicated cyber risk committee no CISO board reporting
Recommended_Control: Establish board-level cybersecurity committee with quarterly CISO reporting

Vulnerability: No formal HIPAA compliance program or officer
Control_Gap: No formal risk analysis no documented compliance program
Recommended_Control: Appoint dedicated HIPAA Security Officer and conduct annual risk analysis

Vulnerability: SSNs of minors exploitable for 18+ years
Control_Gap: No enhanced protections for minor PHI beyond standard HIPAA
Recommended_Control: Implement enhanced monitoring and extended credit monitoring for minor PHI breach victims

Vulnerability: No threat intelligence program or feeds
Control_Gap: No TI program Rhysida TTPs not tracked prior to attack
Recommended_Control: Subscribe to healthcare-specific threat intelligence feeds (H-ISAC)

Vulnerability: Disaster recovery plan never tested before breach
Control_Gap: DR plan existed but never tested 4-month recovery time
Recommended_Control: Conduct quarterly DR tests with documented RTO/RPO targets
